emails.subject: Updated Executed Master Agreement List
emails.body: Updated Executed Master Agreement List Hi Tana, Dianne Sieb in our office told me to ask if you could send me an updated list of all the Executed Master Agreements. The list I have from the Financial Trading group isn't totally correct, and I need an up to date version. Can you help me? Please let me know. Thanks Stacey (403)974-6787

emails.subject: Re: Updated Executed Master Agreement List
emails.body: Re: Updated Executed Master Agreement List Susan Bailey in our Group sends out this list. Your should direct your request to her. Thanks! Stacey Vallejo 12/13/2000 02:30 PM
